2026-04-15T04:16:13.4544643Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-15T04:16:13.4545162Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-15T04:16:13.4545585Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-15T04:16:13.4545958Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m

2026-04-15T04:19:39.5703121Z   1. **CHANGELOG comparison**: The PR shows `Compared with version 6.1.0` but the current version on main is `6.1.2` (Unreleased).
